name: agent-command-locus
description: Agent Command Locus — spatial multi-agent canvas (no OpenAI Codex)

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run typecheck -w @acl/shared && npm run typecheck -w @acl/core
scripts.test: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run test -w @acl/core
scripts.build: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run build -w @acl/core
